hero.headline: I build websites and systems that help businesses sell more, operate cleaner, and track growth with clarity.
hero.paragraph: From a professional website to a management system or dashboard, the goal is simple: clearer experience, smoother operations, and better decisions.

card.label: The idea in short
card.title: Not just a website. Not just code.
card.body: I help turn a business idea or operational problem into a clear digital solution that attracts customers, organizes work, and makes the numbers easier to understand.

hero.portraitCaption: Building software that serves the business, not just runs.

projects.sectionTitle: Real business problems, turned into clear digital solutions.
projects.sectionLead: A sample of websites and systems built around real problems in sales, operations, or follow-up — then shaped into a clearer digital experience.

case.kpiNote: * Demo figures used to explain the kind of business impact expected. They are not verified results from a real project.

clinic.title: Clinic Website
clinic.outcome: From scattered contact to clearer bookings and a calmer patient experience.
clinic.problem: Scattered contact channels and bookings slipping through the cracks.
clinic.built: A clear website with booking, fast contact, and a simpler appointment flow.
clinic.impact: More trust, easier bookings, and a smoother experience for staff and patients.

dashboard.title: Sales Dashboard
dashboard.outcome: From scattered numbers to faster, sharper decisions.
dashboard.problem: Numbers scattered across tools, making every decision slower.
dashboard.built: A single dashboard for revenue, customers, performance, and follow-up.
dashboard.impact: Clearer decisions, stronger follow-up, and focus on what actually moves the business.

billing.title: Billing / Client System
billing.outcome: From messy sheets to organized client follow-up.
billing.problem: Sheets, invoices, payments, and follow-ups tangled together.
billing.built: A system that organizes clients, invoices, payment status, and follow-up in one place.
billing.impact: Less manual work, fewer missed payments, and calmer operations.

partners.title: Projects and collaborations I've worked on.
partners.lead: Real collaborations with businesses serving real customers — each with a clear goal and a different challenge.

ara.name: ARA Tech
ara.who: A Saudi tech company. I worked with them on multiple business systems, dashboards, and internal tools.

limousine.name: Global Limousine EG
limousine.who: A limousine company. I built a custom system to organize bookings, operations, customers, and workflow.

more.name: +6 Clients & Companies
more.who: Worked with more than 6 clients and companies across websites, dashboards, business systems, and automation tools.

social.title: Let's talk
social.subtitle: Active across platforms
social.lead: Got a business that needs a website or a system to organize the work? Send a message and we'll find the right fit.

process.title: How I turn your idea into a result-driven solution
process.lead: A clear process: understand the business, define the goal, build the solution, and improve it around real outcomes.

steps.title: Clarify the offer
steps.body: We define who you serve, what you offer, and why customers should choose you.

steps.title: Present it professionally
steps.body: I help your service show up clearly and build trust from the first impression.

steps.title: Build the right digital experience
steps.body: A website, system, dashboard, or automation that makes the business easier to use and manage.

steps.title: Move toward commercial goals
steps.body: More leads, better follow-up, smoother operations, and clearer numbers.

services.title: What I build and support
services.subtitle: Digital solutions that help businesses sell, organize, and track growth.

websites.title: Websites
websites.body: Present your service clearly and turn visitors into qualified leads.

dashboards.title: Dashboards
dashboards.body: See the numbers instead of guessing them.

systems.title: Management Systems
systems.body: Organize clients, orders, invoices, payments, and follow-up in one place.

automation.title: Automation
automation.body: Reduce repetitive work and free up your team's time.

growth.title: Growth Support
growth.body: Ongoing improvements tied to clear commercial goals.

cta.line1: I'm not here to build and disappear.
cta.line2: I'm here to help your business reach clearer operations, more customers, and commercial goals that are easier to measure.
